---
title: Prepare integration data
---

```{r}
library(SummarizedExperiment)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(zellkonverter)

atac_healthy <- readRDS("scATAC-Healthy-Hematopoiesis-191120.rds")
rna_healthy <- readRDS("scRNA-Healthy-Hematopoiesis-191120.rds")
mapping <- readRDS("scATAC-scRNA-mappings.rds")
```

```{r}
colData(rna_healthy)
colData(atac_healthy)
head(mapping)
```

```{r}
mapping_sub <- mapping[
  mapping$x %in% colnames(atac_healthy) & mapping$y %in% colnames(rna_healthy),
]

atac_healthy <- as(atac_healthy[, mapping_sub$x], "SingleCellExperiment")
rna_healthy <- as(rna_healthy[, mapping_sub$y], "SingleCellExperiment")
assayNames(atac_healthy) <- "counts"
assayNames(rna_healthy) <- "counts"
assay(atac_healthy, "counts")
metadata(atac_healthy) <- list()
metadata(rna_healthy) <- list()

writeH5AD(atac_healthy, "atac_healthy.h5ad", X_name = "counts", compression = "gzip")
writeH5AD(rna_healthy, "rna_healthy.h5ad", X_name = "counts", compression = "gzip")
```
